trivia_bullets.text: Fear of Abduction is one of 14 Enchantment Creature — Nightmare cards bearing the 'Fear of' naming pattern in Duskmourn: House of Horror (DSK, September 2024), forming one of the set's defining cycles. Each personalizes a specific phobia as a supernatural creature native to The House, a sentient haunted manor that functions as its own horror-genre plane. [Scryfall search: type:Nightmare type:Enchantment set:dsk name:/Fear of/]

The card's mechanic literalizes the abduction trope: it costs an additional creature exile to cast (the 'taken' victim), exiles an opponent's creature on entry (the abductee), and returns that creature when it leaves — the classic alien-abduction narrative loop encoded as a temporary, conditional removal spell. Legal in Standard, Pioneer, Modern, Legacy, Vintage, and Commander. [Scryfall]

Art by Fernando Falcone. The card carries no flavor text. EDHREC rank 18025 at time of research, reflecting limited Commander adoption — the additional-cost exile requirement makes it harder to slot than comparable Nightmare enchantments in the cycle. [Scryfall, EDHREC rank via Scryfall edhrec_rank field]
